tasks.label: Run current C file
tasks.command: chcp 65001 > $null; $dir = '${fileDirname}'; $hasHeader = (Get-ChildItem -Path $dir -Filter '*.h' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).Count -gt 0; if ($hasHeader) { $srcs = (Get-ChildItem -Path $dir -Filter '*.c').FullName; $leaf = Split-Path $dir -Leaf; $exeName = Join-Path $dir ($leaf + '.exe') } else { $srcs = @('${file}'); $exeName = '${fileDirname}\${fileBasenameNoExtension}.exe' }; & 'C:\mingw_x64_14_2_0\mingw64\bin\gcc.exe' -finput-charset=UTF-8 -fexec-charset=UTF-8 $srcs -o $exeName; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { & $exeName }
